unsupported_reasons: PDA signer semantics are approximated at the instruction level, not modeled from runtime semantics.
Unchecked AccountInfo fields require conservative assumptions unless explicit invariants are extracted.

obligations.title: cancel: access control
obligations.theorem_skeleton:
theorem cancel_access_control (p_preState : EscrowState) (p_signer : Pubkey)
    (h : cancelTransition p_preState p_signer ≠ none) :
    p_signer = p_preState.initializer := by
  sorry

obligations.title: cancel: token conservation
obligations.theorem_skeleton:
theorem cancel_conservation (p_accounts p_accounts' : List Account) (p_escrow_authority p_initializer_authority : Pubkey) (p_amount : Nat) (h_distinct : p_escrow_authority ≠ p_initializer_authority) (h : cancelPreservesBalances p_accounts p_escrow_authority p_initializer_authority p_amount = some p_accounts') : trackedTotal p_accounts = trackedTotal p_accounts' := by
  sorry

obligations.title: cancel: close / one-shot safety
obligations.theorem_skeleton:
theorem cancel_closes_escrow (p_preState p_postState : EscrowState)
    (h : cancelTransition p_preState = some p_postState) :
    p_postState.lifecycle = Lifecycle.closed := by
  sorry

obligations.title: exchange: token conservation
obligations.theorem_skeleton:
theorem exchange_conservation (p_accounts p_accounts' : List Account) (p_taker_authority p_initializer_authority p_escrow_authority p_taker_receive_authority : Pubkey) (p_taker_amount p_initializer_amount : Nat) (h_distinct1 : p_taker_authority ≠ p_initializer_authority) (h_distinct2 : p_escrow_authority ≠ p_taker_receive_authority) (h : exchangePreservesBalances p_accounts p_taker_authority p_initializer_authority p_escrow_authority p_taker_receive_authority p_taker_amount p_initializer_amount = some p_accounts') : trackedTotal p_accounts = trackedTotal p_accounts' := by
  sorry

theorem exchange_closes_escrow (p_preState p_postState : EscrowState)
    (h : exchangeTransition p_preState = some p_postState) :

  sorry

obligations.title: Program arithmetic safety

theorem cancel_arithmetic_safety  (p_preState p_postState : ProgramState)
    (h : cancelTransition p_preState  = some p_postState) :
    p_amount <= U64_MAX := by
